title: Optimizing a recursive function for efficient memory usage in JavaScript
scenario: Write a JavaScript function to calculate the factorial of a given integer, while minimizing memory usage and optimizing for performance. The function should handle edge cases such as negative numbers and 0. The code should be under 100 lines and use a clear and descriptive variable naming convention.
constraints: Must use memoization to store intermediate results
Must include documentation comments to explain the purpose of the function and its parameters

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the code adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the code is optimized for performance and minimizes memory usage.
Check if the code is well-structured, readable, and follows best practices.
Check if the code is syntactically correct and does not contain any errors.
